/CAL: MOTION TO RELEASE/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSWILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/CONTD: CJC PRG RPT & PTC/DOP/
/CAL:BW STAY AND ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/BWSTAY:11-09-21/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/CONTD:TRAIL 21001133, 21001491/DOP/
/FTRRECORDED/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X:NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 11-16-21/X: BAIL SET AT $5000/
